report_metadata.methodology: Exa Deep Research + Web Search + Official Source Verification

key_findings: Buyback wallet 3vkpy5YHqnqJTnA5doWTpcgKyZiYsaXYzYM9wm8s3WTi confirmed with high confidence
Team allocation (20%, 200B) and vesting schedule verified from multiple sources
No official vesting contract addresses found on Solana blockchain
Team wallet 77DsB confirmed with selling activity (~$7.2M sold)
Kraken 11.2B deposit verified, Bitget 1.757B deposit NOT verified
Treasury wallet G8CcfRffqZWHSAQJXLDfwbAkGE95SddUqVXnTrL4kqjm mentioned but not verified
data_gaps: No official whitepaper or documentation found on pump.fun website
No public vesting smart contract addresses
Limited official announcements about wallet addresses
Bitget 1.757B deposit claim could not be verified

key_findings.mechanism: 100% of daily platform revenue allocated to buybacks

topic_1_buyback_mechanism.verification_notes: Multiple independent sources confirm the buyback wallet address and mechanism. Dune Analytics dashboard tracks buybacks in real-time.

key_findings.vesting_schedule: 12-month cliff, then 25% unlock, followed by 36-month linear vesting

topic_2_team_wallets.verification_notes: Team wallet 77DsB confirmed by multiple blockchain analytics firms (Onchain Lens, Lookonchain). Selling activity tracked on-chain. However, full address not consistently reported.

topic_3_vesting_contracts.verification_notes: No public vesting smart contract addresses found. Vesting schedules reported by third-party analytics platforms (DropsTab, Tokenomist, Bitget) but not verifiable on-chain. This is unusual for a major token launch.

key_findings.whale_concentration: 60% of tokens held by whales (top 340 buyers)

bitget_deposit_claim.notes: No credible sources found for this specific deposit amount

topic_4_whale_addresses.verification_notes: Kraken 11.2B deposit verified by Onchain Lens, AmberCN, and Lookonchain. Bitget 1.757B deposit NOT verified - no credible sources found.

verified_announcements.findings: New AI agent buyback system launched (March 14, 2026)
No official announcements found disclosing team wallet addresses
Tokenomics announced July 9, 2025, but no specific wallet addresses disclosed

twitter_verification.notes: Official Twitter account focuses on product announcements and buyback statistics. Does not publicly disclose team or treasury wallet addresses.

findings.documentation: Minimal - only basic platform usage guides
findings.blog_posts: Limited content, no detailed tokenomics documentation

official_website_research.notes: Pump.fun website is primarily a token launchpad interface. No comprehensive tokenomics documentation or official wallet address disclosures found.

team_allocation.verified: CONFIRMED by DropsTab, Tokenomist, Bitget, Audit.Tokenomics

buyback_wallet.verified: CONFIRMED by Dune Analytics, Solscan, multiple news sources

discrepancies_and_concerns.description: Despite claims of time-based vesting, no smart contract addresses are publicly disclosed or verifiable on Solana blockchain
Team-linked wallet 77DsB sold $7.2M worth of PUMP before cliff unlock date
discrepancies_and_concerns.implications: Suggests tokens may not be fully locked or wallet may not be subject to vesting

discrepancies_and_concerns.description: No whitepaper, detailed tokenomics page, or official wallet address disclosures
discrepancies_and_concerns.implications: Reliance on third-party analytics for verification

discrepancies_and_concerns.description: Claimed 1.757B PUMP deposit to Bitget could not be verified
discrepancies_and_concerns.implications: May be misinformation or misreported amount

recommendations: Request official disclosure of vesting contract addresses from pump.fun team
Monitor team wallet 77DsB for continued selling activity
Verify treasury wallet G8CcfRffqZWHSAQJXLDfwbAkGE95SddUqVXnTrL4kqjm through on-chain analysis
Cross-reference whale addresses with exchange deposit addresses
Track upcoming July 12, 2026 cliff unlock event for team and investor tokens
